case.title: SYLVANDER v. FARMERS & TRADERS LIFE INSURANCE CO.

opinion.h: SYLVANDER v. FARMERS & TRADERS LIFE INSURANCE CO., 364 U.S. 629 (1961)
SYLVANDER ET AL. v. FARMERS & TRADERS LIFE INSURANCE CO. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 529. Decided January 9, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Reported below: See 9 App. Div. 2d 1019, 196 N.Y.S.2d 592.
Joseph W. Burns and Laurence Sovik for appellants.
Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, Samuel A. Hirshowitz, First Assistant Attorney General, and Benjamin E. Shove for appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
364 U.S. 629 BELTOWSKI v. RIGG, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MINNESOTA. No. 405, Misc. Decided January 9, 1961.
